summary: A near-static graphic card reading 'KNOW BEFORE YOU GO' with a spinning globe and colorful FIFA World Cup 2026 and CBP branding, with text advising travelers to have documents ready. There is no audio and the only motion is the spinning globe.
notable_text: KNOW BEFORE YOU GO; FIFA WORLD CUP 2026; U.S. Customs and Border Protection; tweet: 'Be the real MVP and have your documents ready'
